name: mega-orchestration
description: Decide the structure (inline, fan-out, delegate, best-of-N, council, autonomous run), route each role to the best model, verify across vendors, and gate irreversible actions.

interface.shortDescription: Route scoped work to the right agent runtime.
interface.longDescription: A provider-agnostic delegation skill and config for deciding when to use Codex, Claude, a vendor-neutral browser/visual delegate (playwright-cli plus a vision-capable model), or same-model subagents for review, implementation, visual, and browser work.
defaultPrompt: Use mega-orchestration to review this plan.
Use mega-orchestration to delegate this safely.
